mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings (room_number, guest_name, phone, check_in_date, check_out_date, total_amount) VALUES ( #{roomNumber}, #{guestName}, #{phone}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{totalAmount})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM bookings WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(check_out_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, SUM(total_amount) as revenue FROM bookings WHERE status = 3 AND check_out_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(check_out_date, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
